nasb.text: Then Peter, filled with the Holy Spirit, said to them, “Rulers and elders of the people,

esv.text: Then Peter, filled with the Holy Spirit, said to them, “Rulers of the people and elders,

cnv.text: 當時彼得被聖靈充滿，對他們說：“民眾的領袖和長老啊！

ccb.text: 那时彼得被圣灵充满，对他们说：“各位百姓的官长和长老啊，

csbs.text: 那时，彼得被圣灵充满，对他们说：“民众的首领和长老们，
